service.name: slack
service.description: Slack Web API for messaging and workspace management

intents.description: Send a message to a Slack channel

params.name: channel
params.description: Channel ID or name to send the message to

response.description: Message post confirmation with channel, timestamp, and message details

intents.description: List channels in the Slack workspace

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of channels to return (default 100, max 1000)

params.name: types
params.description: Comma-separated list of channel types (public_channel, private_channel, mpim, im)

intents.description: List users in the Slack workspace

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of users to return (default 0 for no limit)

response.description: List of user objects with profile information
